ohtani.title: Sebastián Rivero & Jo Adell lead Angels to a 13-5 win
ohtani.blurb: Sebastián Rivero drives in six runs on five hits and Jo Adell homers in a four-hit game, leading the Angels to a 13-5 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Craig Counsell recaps Cubs' comeback victory
imanaga.blurb: Craig Counsell talks about Shota Imanaga's start, the inside-the-park home run, and the Cubs' 9th inning comeback to win the game

suzuki.title: Matt Chapman's go-ahead hit lifts Giants to 2-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Matt Chapman connects with a go-ahead hit in the 10th to back Trevor McDonald's six-strikeout start in the Giants' 2-1 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Yankees score five runs in the 8th for comeback win
yoshida.blurb: Yankees, led by Cody Bellinger's go-ahead home run and Jazz Chisholm Jr.'s three-run home run, score five runs in the 8th inning for a 6-1 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Cristopher Sánchez sits down 10 in Phillies' win
okamoto.blurb: Cristopher Sánchez strikes out 10 and Adolis García mashes a two-run home run in the Phillies' 5-2 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Carson Benge's historic game leads Mets to a 7-3 win
matsui.blurb: Carson Benge's historic five-hit game and the Mets' three homers guide them to a 7-3 victory over the Padres
